name: ClickStart Mortgage
description_short: SecurityNational Mortgage Company loan officer Martha Rodriguez offers mortgage lending services in Phoenix, AZ, specializing in conventional, FHA, VA, and jumbo loans with bilingual support.
description_long:
Martha Rodriguez operates as a Branch Manager and loan officer (NMLS# 989918) for SecurityNational Mortgage Company, serving the Phoenix, Arizona market from their location at 5100 N 99th Ave, Unit 101. She is part of SecurityNational Mortgage Company (Co. NMLS #3116), a mortgage lender offering a full range of home financing products. Rodriguez positions herself as a community-focused loan officer with specific expertise serving the Hispanic community, offering bilingual support in English and Spanish to guide borrowers through the mortgage process.

SecurityNational Mortgage offers competitive interest rates across multiple loan product types, including fixed-rate conventional mortgages, FHA loans, VA loans, jumbo loans, and down-payment assistance programs. The company provides the full mortgage lifecycle services: pre-qualification and pre-approval, loan processing, rate lock-in options, and closing. They also offer educational resources including calculators, FAQs, loan payment charts, and an SNapp mobile application for document upload and account management.

Rodriguez differentiates herself through community focus and bilingual service delivery, particularly emphasizing financial literacy and generational wealth-building for Hispanic families. The company provides educational content through their website, community blog, and success stories. They offer flexible loan timeline processing (10-45 days depending on complexity) and claim to deliver a five-star client experience with personalized support for first-time homebuyers, refinancing borrowers, and real estate investors.

As a single loan officer profile page, this represents a specific point of contact within SecurityNational Mortgage rather than a standalone company. Consumers should verify current rates, loan terms, and program availability directly, as the website displays general educational information rather than specific loan product details, rates, or terms. The company operates through multiple loan officers and branches, so experience may vary.
address: 2929 N Central Ave STE 1520, Phoenix, AZ 85012

company_info.headquarters: 2929 N Central Ave STE 1520, Phoenix, AZ 85012

pros: Bilingual loan officer (English and Spanish) serving Hispanic community specifically
Offers multiple loan product types: conventional, FHA, VA, jumbo, and down-payment assistance programs
SNapp mobile app for fast document upload (W2s, income statements)
Pre-qualification and pre-approval available to assess buying power before home search
Rate lock-in protection during loan approval process
Fast loan processing timeline possible (10 days minimum)
Personalized support across borrower types: first-time buyers, refinancers, and investors
cons: Website does not display actual interest rates or loan terms—only general educational content
No pricing or fee schedule publicly available; upfront costs discovered only during application
Credit report fee may apply at application stage
Loan approval timeline can extend to 45 days depending on complexity and personal finances
Single loan officer page limits transparency about full company underwriting standards and approval rates
best_for: Hispanic homebuyers seeking bilingual mortgage support and community-focused guidance
First-time homebuyers needing pre-qualification and educational resources
Borrowers exploring multiple loan product types (FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo) simultaneously
Real estate investors seeking down-payment assistance or portfolio expansion financing
diagnosis: Best for Spanish-speaking homebuyers and first-time mortgage applicants in the Phoenix area seeking personalized guidance and access to multiple loan products. Main caveat: This is a single loan officer profile within a larger company; actual rates, terms, and approval criteria are not disclosed online and must be obtained through direct application.
services: SNapp mobile app for document submission and account management
Loan payment calculators and educational resources
